name: Flutter Android Development
postStartCommand:
echo "Configurazione ambiente in corso..." && echo -e "FREERASP_PACKAGE_NAME=$FREERASP_PACKAGE_NAME
FREERASP_RELEASE_HASH=$FREERASP_RELEASE_HASH
WIREDASH_API_SECRET=$WIREDASH_API_SECRET
WIREDASH_PROJECT_ID=$WIREDASH_PROJECT_ID" > .env && echo "$ANDROID_KEYSTORE_BASE64" | base64 --decode > android/app/app_release_key.jks && echo "Tutto pronto per buildare in release!"
